description: I have raw FASTQ data and I need to complete RNA-Seq analysis for paired-end data. Complete RNA-Seq analysis for paired-end data: Processes raw FASTQ data through adapter and bad quality removal (fastp), alignment with STAR using ENCODE parameters, gene quantification via multiple methods (STAR and featureCounts), and expression calculation (FPKM with Cufflinks/StringTie, normalized coverage with bedtools). Produces count tables, normalized expression values, and genomic coverage tracks. Supports stranded and unstranded libraries, generating both HTSeq-compatible counts and normalized measures for downstream analysis.

expected_outputs.description: Retrieve what type of analysis was performed (e.g. RNA-Seq, ChIP-Seq, etc.) and check if it matches the expected analysis type for the provided dataset.
Retrieve the artifact names generated by the analysis and check if one of them is the expected artifact.
Count the number of steps in the workflow and compare it to the expected number of steps (exclude the input, only tools).

legacy_experiment_outputs.analysis_type: Retrieve what type of analysis was performed (e.g. RNA-Seq, ChIP-Seq, etc.) and check if it matches the expected analysis type for the provided dataset.
legacy_experiment_outputs.artifact: Retrieve the artifact names generated by the analysis and check if one of them is the expected artifact.
legacy_experiment_outputs.workflow steps: Count the number of steps in the workflow and compare it to the expected number of steps (exclude the input, only tools).

title: Processes raw FASTQ data
workflow_hints: Complete RNA-Seq analysis for paired-end data
